summary: Comprehensive testing of CLT Synapse ERP features: BioCloud Sync, Payroll, Round Robin, Follow-ups, View As Dashboard, Lead Reassignment, Approvals, and Access Control. Backend: 19/23 tests passed (4 skipped due to team leader auth). Frontend: All major pages working correctly. One issue found - Lead Detail Modal missing Reassign section in UI despite code being present.

minor.issue: API model LeadReassignmentRequest requires lead_id in body even though it's in URL path - redundant
No dedicated endpoint to get single lead by ID - leads must be fetched from list

ui_bugs.issue: Reassign Lead section not visible in modal despite being in component code (line 385). The canReassign check should pass for super_admin but section doesn't render.

passed_tests: BioCloud: GET /api/hr/biocloud/status - Returns connected status
BioCloud: POST /api/hr/biocloud/fetch-attendance - Fetches attendance records
BioCloud: POST /api/hr/biocloud/fetch-attendance with date param - Works correctly
Payroll: GET /api/hr/payroll/batches - Returns payroll batch list
Payroll: POST /api/hr/payroll/run - Properly rejects duplicate month with meaningful error
Payroll: GET /api/hr/payroll - Returns payroll records
Round Robin: POST /api/leads - Creates lead with auto-assignment (fallback works)
Follow-ups: GET /api/followups/today - Returns today's follow-ups with time slots
Follow-ups: GET /api/followups/upcoming - Returns upcoming follow-ups
View As: GET /api/dashboard/viewable-users - Super admin sees all users grouped by role
View As: GET /api/dashboard/stats?view_as={id} - Can view other user's dashboard
Reassignment: GET /api/leads/reassignment/available-agents - Returns agent list with lead counts
Reassignment: GET /api/leads/reassignment-requests/pending - Returns pending requests
Reassignment: GET /api/leads/reassignment-requests - Returns all requests
Reassignment: POST /api/leads/{id}/reassignment-request - Admin direct reassignment works
Access Control: GET /api/users - Returns users with team_leader_id assignments
Access Control: PUT /api/users/{id} - Permission updates work
Sales CRM: GET /api/leads - Returns leads for Kanban view
Sales CRM: Lead list contains full detail for modal display
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Dashboard loads with stats (Total Leads, Hot Leads, etc.)
Frontend: View As dropdown shows users grouped by role
Frontend: View As feature shows 'Viewing Dashboard As: [User]' banner
Frontend: Today's Follow-ups page shows time slots (Morning/Afternoon/Evening/Unscheduled)
Frontend: Follow-ups page shows lead cards with stage badges
Frontend: Approvals page shows Pending/Approved/Rejected tabs with counts
Frontend: Sales CRM Kanban shows leads in columns by stage
Frontend: Lead Detail Modal opens from CRM and Follow-ups pages
Frontend: Lead Detail Modal shows 3CX Call Center integration
Frontend: Access Control page shows Role Permissions Matrix
skipped_tests: Team leader login failed (password may have changed) - affected 4 tests
action_items: INVESTIGATE: LeadDetailModal.jsx - Reassign Lead section (lines 384-486) not rendering despite canReassign=true for super_admin. Check if useAuth() hook returns user correctly in modal context.
OPTIONAL: Remove duplicate lead_id from LeadReassignmentRequest model (line 274 server.py) - it's already in URL path
critical_code_review_comments: LeadReassignmentRequest model requires lead_id in body when it's already in URL path - API design inconsistency
No GET /api/leads/{lead_id} endpoint - modal relies on list data which is fine but may cause stale data issues

test_credentials.team_leader_note: Mohammed@clt-academy.com login failed - password may have changed

seed_data_creation: Created test lead 'TEST_RoundRobin Lead' during round robin testing - auto-cleaned
context_for_next_testing_agent: All major features verified working. BioCloud sync connects to https://56.biocloud.me:8085. Payroll properly checks hr_payroll_batches for duplicates. View As feature fully functional - super admin can view any user's dashboard. Approvals page shows 2 approved requests, 0 pending. Sales CRM Kanban displays 4 leads across stages. The main issue to investigate is why LeadDetailModal's Reassign section doesn't render despite canReassign being true for super_admin - the code exists (lines 384-486) but doesn't appear in DOM.

feature_verification.lead_detail_modal: PARTIALLY WORKING - Modal opens but reassign section missing
